settings.text: Fastest path is the phone — our dispatcher answers 24/7 for emergencies and 7am–7pm for standard jobs. Or send the details below and we'll reply same-day.

settings.title: Sellwood, SE Portland.
settings.description: We're on the trucks most of the day — call before stopping by.

settings.question: What info should I have ready when I call?
settings.answer: Your address with a cross-street, a quick description of the problem, and — if it's safe — a photo or two you can text us after you hang up. That's usually enough to give you a response window and a rough flat-rate quote before we roll.

settings.question: Do you offer free estimates for remodels?
settings.answer: Yes, for planned work like bathroom remodels, kitchen remodels, repipes, and gas line projects. We come out, walk the space with you, and send a fixed written quote within 48 hours. No charge, no obligation.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: Credit card, debit card, bank transfer, personal check, and cash. For jobs over $1,500 we accept 50% deposit and 50% on completion. No finance charges or hidden fees on any payment method.

settings.question: How does after-hours emergency dispatch work?
settings.answer: Same number, any hour. A live dispatcher answers — not a machine. There's a $75 after-hours dispatch fee that applies as a credit toward the job if you hire us. Response is typically 60–90 minutes inside our core service area.

settings.question: Can I schedule a standard appointment online?
settings.answer: Not yet — we still run scheduling through the phone because most calls need a quick back-and-forth to get the job right before booking. Email is fine for quote requests and remodels; phone is faster for repairs.

settings.title: Prefer email?
settings.text:
hello@pipeworksplumbing.co

Send photos of the problem for the fastest reply during business hours.
Most questions get a straight answer in under two minutes. Forms wait for office hours — phones don't.
